title: Zero In Fly Papers FSC - 4-Pack FSC Compliant, Sticky Natural Trap Controls Flies, Fungus Gnats, Fruit Flies, Mosquitoes and Bugs, White
features: 4-PACK: Great value-for-money, traditional, tried-and-trusted insect control
EFFECTIVE: Traditional design manufactured with high-quality materials traps and kills over 30% more flies than other brands
NATURALLY ATTRACTIVE: Clean white paper baited with natural insect attractant, providing a fruity scent and increased catch
EASY SET-UP: Gently pull out and hang securely using thumb tack (supplied) and end-loop retainer
VERSATILE: Indoor and outdoor use including kitchen areas, outbuildings, and other vulnerable areas
FSC MATERIALS: Registered and manufactured using Forest Stewardship Council materials
description: Product Description Cost effective fly papers Attracts and kills flies and other bugs using a natural fruit scent for increased catch rates DIRECTIONS FOR USE: Bring to room temperature Slowly pull-out string and unwind adhesive strip in an anti-clockwise direction Hang strip in area where flies are becoming a nuisance Use thumb tack provided to secure in place Suitable for indoor and outdoor use Box Contains 4 x Fly Papers
